description: Distribution free statistical procedures or methods valid under nonrestrictive assumptions: basic tools; counting methods; order statistics, ranks, empirical distribution functions; distribution free tests and associated interval and point estimators; sign test; signed rank tests; rank tests; Mann Whitney Wilcoxon procedures; Kolmogorov Smirnov tests; permutation methods; kernel density estimation; kernel and spline regression estimation; computer techniques and programs; discussion and comparison with parametric methods.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: STAT 333,340, graduate/professional standing, or declared in Statistics VISP

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: STAT 333,340, graduate/professional standing, or declared in Statistics VISP
